message:
fix(main): propagate TrustCardRegistry::list Result through CLI call sites

Since TrustCardRegistry::list now returns Result, update all call sites
in main.rs to .map_err(|err| anyhow::anyhow!(err.to_string()))? —
specifically TrustCommand::List, TrustCommand::Sync post-sync list,
and quarantine_trust_cards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
